rows.evidence_note: TIGER 2024 county polygon is fully covered by the expected BTS/NTAD time-zone polygon at seed precision. Expected assignment zone: utc-minus-06-00; geometry source: BTS/NTAD Time Zones ArcGIS FeatureServer layer 0.

TIGER 2024 county polygon intersects the expected BTS/NTAD Central polygon with coverage ratio 0.9999933435; residual outside area is a small coastal/source-boundary sliver. Expected assignment zone: utc-minus-06-00; geometry source: BTS/NTAD Time Zones ArcGIS FeatureServer layer 0.
caveats: Baldwin County has a tiny residual outside the BTS/NTAD Central polygon at source precision; review before publication.
